speaker: Blanche
text: So you're telling me there's a worm inside my body?

speaker: statist
text: Whatever in creation that got into you isn’t just one worm, it's like an entire world of worms.

speaker: statist
text: You're infested like a cat with a pot-bellly.

speaker: statist
text: Were you so ill that you couldn't get a ride to a hospital?

speaker: Blanche
text: We had so much fun together.

speaker: statist
text: WIth an infestation that severe it's a miracle you haven't exploded into flying jako	right here.
